summary: Tested all 6 admin panel improvements: Products/Plans/Users table white backgrounds, Currencies Add button size='sm', and backend schema migration for signup forms. All 6 tests PASS.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 admin panel improvements verified: (1) Products table has bg-white (class: rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white overflow-x-auto) - PASS; (2) Plans table has bg-white (same class) - PASS; (3) Users table has bg-white (same class) - PASS; (4) Currencies Add button is size=sm (h-8, 32px, same as Products New Product button which is also 32px) - PASS. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests pass - signup_form_schema has email+password locked fields, partner_signup_form_schema has admin_email+admin_password locked fields via _migrate_signup_schema and _migrate_partner_signup_schema functions. Admin login: use /api/auth/login directly with email=admin@automateaccounts.local / pwd=ChangeMe123!, no partner_code needed for API. Frontend: set aa_token in localStorage and navigate to /admin.

test_results.test1_products_table_white_bg: PASS - Container class: 'rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white overflow-x-auto', computed bg: rgb(255, 255, 255)
test_results.test2_plans_table_white_bg: PASS - Container class: 'rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white overflow-x-auto', computed bg: rgb(255, 255, 255)
test_results.test3_users_table_white_bg: PASS - Container class: 'rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white overflow-x-auto', computed bg: rgb(255, 255, 255)
test_results.test4_currencies_add_button_sm: PASS - Button height=32px, class has h-8, same as Products 'New Product' button (also 32px)
test_results.test5_backend_signup_schema_email_passwo: PASS - 8/8 backend tests for signup_form_schema (email+password locked) and partner_signup_form_schema (admin_email+admin_password locked)
test_results.test6_public_endpoint_signup_schema: PASS - Public /api/website-settings?partner_code=AA also returns correct migrated schemas
